title: Tron's Justin Sun sues Trump-linked World Liberty Financial over frozen assets
summary: World Liberty unfairly froze Sun's $WLFI tokens and threatened him, the lawsuit alleged.

title: Bitcoin climbs to $77,500 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy - CoinDesk
summary: Bitcoin climbs to $77,500 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy  CoinDesk

title: Bitcoin climbs to $78,100 on Trump ceasefire extension, Strategy's $2.5 billion buy
summary: Bitcoin traded at $77,541 on Wednesday morning, up 2.2% over 24 hours and 4.3% on the week, after Trump extended the Iran ceasefire and Strategy disclosed its largest BTC purchase in 17 months.
